rows.description: Computus Francisci Webber Rectory a 2do Die Novembris 1762 ad eundem Diem revolutione 1763.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for this header. gpt-5-mini split this logical header into two separate rows, which does not accurately reflect the singular entry on the page. Visual verification confirmed gemini-flash's full description and grouping are correct.
rows.section_header: Computus Francisci Webber Rectory a 2do Die Novembris 1762 ad eundem Diem revolutione 1763.

rows.notes: Consensus on description and type. gpt-5-mini included a period at the end of 'Recepta' which is visible in the image, so this was incorporated. High confidence due to clear image and agreement.
This row (column headers for amounts) was extracted from gpt-5-mini. It is clearly visible on the ledger page but was missed by gemini-flash.
Consensus on amounts and row type. gpt-5-mini's description (including the period after 'Rect.') was visually verified as slightly more accurate. Amounts are clear.
rows.english_description: Annual rent due from the Merton rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent due from the Merton rectory, amounting to £5 11s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Visually verified gpt-5-mini's description 'Yardington Tenem.' as more accurate; the initial letter is clearly a 'Y', and 'Tenem.' is a better transcription of the abbreviation.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment of the rent for the Yardington tenement, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: Lord nunc Taylor pro an. & Din. ad Mich.

rows.english_description: Annual payment from Taylor (Lord), including the Michaelmas dinner charge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Taylor (Lord), including the Michaelmas dinner charge, amounting to £5 11s 0½d.
